records.m_Talk_ENG: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mark of humanity advancing to treasure!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We stand together on the ocean, beneath the blue sky!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And even against the tidal waves, sail forth!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one can...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one can...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one can...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Yuppie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Yuppie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long are you going to stay back there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long are you going to stay back there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long are you going to stay back there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave me alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave me alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave me alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I was going to get a new job, and look where I'm at... I'm just trash with no hope.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I was going to get a new job, and look where I'm at... I'm just trash with no hope.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I was going to get a new job, and look where I'm at... I'm just trash with no hope.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I'm a pirate now, I guess I'm the trash in the ocean that's hurting the environment! Ah ha ha ha!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I'm a pirate now, I guess I'm the trash in the ocean that's hurting the environment! Ah ha ha ha!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I'm a pirate now, I guess I'm the trash in the ocean that's hurting the environment! Ah ha ha ha!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Pirates should stand proud, no matter when or where.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Pirates should stand proud, no matter when or where.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Pirates should stand proud, no matter when or where.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you say that when you're the one who kidnapped me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you say that when you're the one who kidnapped me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you say that when you're the one who kidnapped me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It should be good for you, though, since you somehow brought a swimsuit and you've already changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It should be good for you, though, since you somehow brought a swimsuit and you've already changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It should be good for you, though, since you somehow brought a swimsuit and you've already changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What are two broke girls going to do, anyw
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What are two broke girls going to do, anyw
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What are two broke girls going to do, anyw
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mone! Monene!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mone! Monene!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mone! Monene!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monenene!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monenene!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monenene!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A penguin...? What is that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A penguin...? What is that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A penguin...? What is that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that outfit. I think I've seen that before...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that outfit. I think I've seen that before...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that outfit. I think I've seen that before...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found it! Cute animal!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found it! Cute animal!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found it! Cute animal!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cute animal? You mean, from the ciphertext?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cute animal? You mean, from the ciphertext?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cute animal? You mean, from the ciphertext?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's definitely cute, but it looks angry right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's definitely cute, but it looks angry right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's definitely cute, but it looks angry right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Help
8g.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Help
8g.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Help
8g.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't move. I'm hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't move. I'm hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't move. I'm hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's weird. Penguins are nice, and they don't attack people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's weird. Penguins are nice, and they don't attack people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's weird. Penguins are nice, and they don't attack people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere hasn't done anything to deserve being buried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere hasn't done anything to deserve being buried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere hasn't done anything to deserve being buried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Credere has done nothing but buy all of the penguins' snacks and raise their price.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Credere has done nothing but buy all of the penguins' snacks and raise their price.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Credere has done nothing but buy all of the penguins' snacks and raise their price.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Chief. My instincts are telling me to get away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Chief. My instincts are telling me to get away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Chief. My instincts are telling me to get away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is just going to be more of a hassle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is just going to be more of a hassle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is just going to be more of a hassle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. A true pirate never ignores those in need.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. A true pirate never ignores those in need.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. A true pirate never ignores those in need.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not what a pirate do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not what a pirate do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not what a pirate do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least that's how the Sigma Pirates operate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least that's how the Sigma Pirates operate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least that's how the Sigma Pirates operate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Yuppie. This is the glorious first journey of the new Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Yuppie. This is the glorious first journey of the new Sigma Pirates!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Yuppie. This is the glorious first journey of the new Sigma Pirates!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, I'm just trying to make ends meet! Why does it have to be this hard?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, I'm just trying to make ends meet! Why does it have to be this hard?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, I'm just trying to make ends meet! Why does it have to be this hard?!
